mapper.select: SELECT auth_grp_seq ,auth_grp_nm ,auth_grp_expl ,use_yn ,rgst_user_seq ,rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time ,upt_user_seq ,upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM tb_auth_grp ORDER BY auth_grp_seq

SELECT auth_seq ,auth_grp_seq ,auth_nm ,auth_expl ,use_yn ,rgst_user_seq ,rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time ,upt_user_seq ,upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM tb_auth WHERE auth_grp_seq = #{authGrpSeq} ORDER BY auth_seq

SELECT tau.auth_user_seq ,tau.auth_grp_seq ,tau.auth_seq ,tau.user_seq ,tu.user_id ,tu.user_name ,tau.str_dt ,tau.end_dt ,tau.use_yn ,tau.rgst_user_seq ,tau.rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time ,tau.upt_user_seq ,tau.upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM tb_auth_user tau INNER JOIN tb_user tu ON tau.user_seq = tu.user_seq WHERE tau.auth_grp_seq = #{authGrpSeq} AND tau.auth_seq = #{authSeq} ORDER BY tau.auth_user_seq

SELECT tu.user_seq ,tu.user_id ,tu.user_name FROM tb_user tu WHERE 1=1
AND ((upper(tu.user_id) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchText}) || '%') OR (upper(tu.user_name) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchText}) || '%'))
AND tu.use_yn = 'Y'
ORDER BY tu.user_seq
